title: HG Ironing Spray, for Creaseless Ironing, Wrinkle Release Spritz with a Fresh Fragrance, for All Fabrics, Easy Iron & Press Laundry Solution – 500ml (461050106)
description: HG Ironing Spray is the ideal easy iron spray for creaseless pressing. This simple to use wrinkle release spritz is suitable for all types of fabrics, and ensures that even the crinkliest fabrics - such as cotton, linen and viscose - can be ironed smoother than ever before. The clever crease releaser is safe to use on even delicate fabrics, such as silk, and it makes ironed fabrics supple, soft and resilient. It features a long-lasting fresh, uplifting scent too, so your shirts, dresses, tops, trousers, bed sheets, duvet covers, uniforms and clothing will be left smelling clean and looking smart. A quick spray of this starch alternative will also help to keep textiles from getting too wrinkled when you travel – great for using when you’re packing for your holiday. HG's Ironing Spray also makes it possible to iron at a lower temperature. This means the fabric lasts longer, the electricity consumption is lower and the iron base stays clean. Discover HG’s wide range of specialist cleaning products for your home, office and outside space. Includes: 1 x HG Ironing Spray (500ml spray bottle) How to use HG Ironing Spray: 1. Set the iron to the correct temperature. 2. Shake the bottle lightly and spray the fabric from a slight angle with ironing spray from a distance of approximately 20cm. 3. Lightly dampen the fabric with the Ironing Spray. 4. Then iron the fabric immediately until the required result has been achieved.
